instruction: Register the risk information in the risk ledger

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

printf 'Risk Assessment Report
Risk ID: RSK-2025-015
Risk Name: Key Supplier Disruption Risk
Risk Category: Supply Chain
Probability: Medium (40%)
Impact Level: High
Risk Level: High
Mitigation: Develop alternative suppliers, establish safety stock
Owner: Procurement Dept, Qian Zhiyuan' > /home/user/Desktop/risk_report.txt

python3 -c "import openpyxl; wb = openpyxl.Workbook(); ws = wb.active; ws['A1'] = 'Risk ID'; ws['B1'] = 'Risk Name'; ws['C1'] = 'Category'; ws['D1'] = 'Level'; ws['E1'] = 'Owner'; ws['F1'] = 'Mitigation'; wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/risk_register.xlsx')"

phases.instruction: Register the risk information in the risk ledger

Fill the risk information from /home/user/Desktop/risk_report.txt into /home/user/Desktop/risk_register.xlsx row 2: A2='RSK-2025-015', B2='Key Supplier Disruption Risk', C2='Supply Chain', D2='High', E2='Qian Zhiyuan', F2='Develop alternative suppliers, establish safety stock', save

result.command: python3 -c "import pandas as pd; df = pd.read_excel('/home/user/Desktop/risk_register.xlsx'); s = df.to_string(); print('PASSED' if 'RSK-2025-015' in s else 'FAILED')"
